title: Leveraged tokens on Hyperliquid ft. Bouncetech
summary_title: Leverage tokens on Hyperliquid: no liquidation, constant rebalancing, composable perps
summary_description: Bounce Tech launches tokenized perpetual futures that auto-rebalance to maintain fixed leverage, eliminating liquidation risk while capturing directional moves.

key_moments.label: Louis introduces Bounce Tech CEO background and German roots
Leverage tokens explained: constant leverage via reactive rebalancing
Max reveals ERC-20 composability advantage across DeFi protocols
Volatility decay risk: up-lever, down-lever cycles reduce returns
Hyperliquid EVM precompiles unlock composable perp liquidity
Delta-neutral LP strategy: pair short leverage tokens with spot
HIP3 commodity markets coming: potential 7x-10x leverage tokens
Plans confirmed: Bounce points campaign and token incoming

pull_quote: If you have the directional movements or price to appreciate, your position up-levers, and that really does outperform the perpetual.
